expectations.text: Mentions that Android uses 'elevation' instead of iOS shadow properties
expectations.evidence: First paragraph: 'Android does not support iOS-style shadow properties... You need to use elevation instead.'

expectations.text: Mentions that backgroundColor must be set for elevation to render
expectations.evidence: Section '1. backgroundColor is required' with code examples showing the fix

expectations.text: Provides a Platform.select or Platform.OS code example
expectations.evidence: Full Platform.select code example in 'The Fix' section

expectations.text: Warns about high borderRadius values (>2000) causing crashes on Android
expectations.evidence: Section '2. High borderRadius can crash Android' — mentions 9999 and suggests 999 max

expectations.text: References or checks the actual project code for existing shadow usage
expectations.evidence: Section 'Your Project Already Has This' — mentions makeShadow helper in theme/spacing.ts
